title: WEATHERIZATION ASSISTANCE PROGRAM - 211info
text: COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY WEATHERIZATION SERVICES WEATHERIZATION ASSISTANCE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides weatherization assistance to help lower the energy usage of low-income households. Services may include weather-stripping of doors and windows, floor, wall, and ceiling insulation, duct insulation and sealing. Also offers information on health and safety, as well as energy education. 4700 Silverton Road NE Salem, OR 97305 Eligibility: Household income must be at or below 200% of Federal Poverty Level (FPL). See website for income guidelines. Hours: Monday-Thursday 7am-5:30pm Email (503) 315-7055 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 315-7055 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website, call for more information or appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: -Proof of income for household members 18 and over -Social security numbers and birth dates for all household members -Utility bills (gas and electric) LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 7am-5:30pm Services: Weatherization Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY WEATHERIZATION SERVICES
